text:
(In reply to Nikolai Lifanov from comment #11)
Just read the differential, surprised there were issues. I tested the if statement several times with in poudriere with varying situations and they all worked as expected. Even if the if statement returned true on a lower major version, the var selected would only work on 11 so it wouldn't matter. But as long as it works I am happy.

OSSYS is def a good check to add as well I will remember this!
